raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 15,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Wiwſch darrija arridsan
erusalemē Stiprumus zaur
ndro Strahdneeko Padohmu
dohmatus/ ka tee uß Turneem
n Stuhreem buhtu/ ka ar Bul-
hin un leeleein Akmiieem
haut warretu. Ta iſpaude
inaa Slawa itt tahku/jo wiw-
aın tappe brihnigi palihdſehts/
mehr wiwſch warrens tappe.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 16,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Kad nu wiwſch bija war-
ns tappis/ tad leppojaſs win-
a Sirds winnam par Bohja-
fchaan/ un wiwſch pahrkahpe
ett to KUNGU jawu Deewu/
wiwſch gahje ta KUNGA
ammā/ grippedains us to
wehpja-Altari kwehpinaht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 17,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Bet Asartjus tas Pree-
ris gahje tam pakak/ un ar
innu aſtondefmits gohdigt
teeſteri ta KUNGA.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 18,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tee turrejahs tam Keh-
naim Uſijum pretti/ un fazzija
to: Tas teiw ne peenahkahs
jus tam KUNGAM kweh-
naht/ bet teem Preestereem A-
za Dchleem/ kas kwehpi-
fchanas pehz kwehtiti irr. Is-
no tahs fwehtas Weetas/ jo
eſſi pahrkahpis/ un tas teiw
buhs par Gohdu pee tawa
ewa ta KUNGA.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 19,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad apſkaitahs Uſijus/
"
    },
    {
      "n": 20,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tas augſtais Preeste-
ris Asartjus uſluhkoja to ar wiw-
ſeem Preestereem/un raugi/ tag
bija ſpittaligs preekſch ſawas
Peeres/ un tee atſtuhine winnu
drihſi no tennenes. Wiwſch pats
arri ſteidſehs iſeet/ jo tas KUNGS
mohzija winnu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 21,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ta bija tas Kehniaisch U-
ſijus ſpittaligs lihds ſawas Mir-
fchanas Deenai/ un ſpittaligs
buhdams dſihwoja wiwſch weend
atſchkirta Namma/ jo wiwſch bi-
ja no ta KUNGA Namma iſ-
flehgts. Un winna Dehis Jo-
tamſ bija pahr ta Kehnina
Nammu/ un teefaja tahs Seim-
mes Laudis.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 22,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un kaß wehl no Uſijus
Leetahm atleek/ tik labbi tahs
pirmas ka tahs pehdejaß/ tahs
irr tas Praueets Esatjas Amoza
Dehls uſrakſtijs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 23,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un Uſijus atſmigge ar
faweein Tehweem/ un tee ap-
raſke to pee winna Tehweem/tai
Tibrumā/ kur to Kehniau Kap-
venes bija/ jo tee fazzija: Wiwſch
irr ſpittaliqs. Un winna Dehis
Jotamſtappe par Kehniau win-
na Weeta.
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
